title: [webentitywidgets]
text: [webentitywidgets] The [webentitywidgets] section of the initialization file contains logical widget definitions for entities used in Dynamic Server Page (DSP) components. LogicalWidgetName = PhysicalWidgetName { ( WidgetProperty1 = Value1 ; WidgetProperty2 = Value2 ; ... ) } Description Each logical widget maps to a physical widget, and optionally sets some of its properties. The property values defined in this section override the hard-coded defaults of the physical widget. The maximum length of the widget property string is 1024 characters. You can use this section to define your own logical widgets for entities. [webentitywidgets] ; Logical to physical mapping of entity widget for DSPs custom-Entity=customEntity Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
